title: Rise and fall of empires
description: Test your knowledge on the rise and fall of empires!
topic_path: The rise and fall of empires

hints: An empire isn't necessarily united by a common set of beliefs or language.

choices.content: A centralized state that has political control over many territories
A centralized state that has many alliances with other states
A territory united by a common language and set of beliefs

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is true about the processes by which empires rose?**



[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Imperial growth didn't always happen as a result of conquest.

choices.content: Processes were rarely the same across different empires
Empires always rose as a result of military conquest
The rise of empires generally involved mass religious conversion of a population

assessment_items.question_content:
**When are empires considered to have collapsed?**


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The collapse of an empire doesn't always have to do with the death of an emperor.

choices.content: When their most prominent emperor dies
When the central state is no longer able to wield power
Where there is no more money in the central treasury
A smaller political unit within an empire
A state that is not an empire

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following empires rose due in large part to factors related to political and military leadership?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
